subject: Did you see that Trump retweeted my story?
body:
I think my wife is going to change the lock on the door tonight.
https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/842739155230740481

--
Landon Thomas, Jr.  
Financial Reporter  
New York Times  
██████████  
http://topics.nytimes.com/top/reference/timestopics/people/t/landon_jr_thomas/index.html
